description: The TextureQualitySettings component is part of the Settings menu and should be interacted with via such menu instead of through this component.

fields.TextureSizeRatio: The ratio at which textures should be loaded locally versus their original size on the cloud.
fields.TextureSizeLimit: The maximum Texture Size that textures should be loaded at.
fields.MinimumTextureSize: The minimum size textures loaded can be locally.
fields.DefaultFilterMode: The default Texture mode that textures will be if they don't manually specify their Texture mode.
fields.AnisotropicLevel: The Anisotropic levels textures should have.
fields.UseAnisotropicLevel: Whether the Anisotropic levels should be used.

methods.ReloadAllTextures: Forces a reload of all loaded textures to use curre t Settings (LAGGY)
